space_control: Maximize reachable open area using flood-fill heuristics and veto any move that could trap the snake; space control is the primary winning strategy.
food: Eat only when health is critically low or when behind on length relative to opponents; avoid dead-end food sources that restrict movement and reachable space.
combat: Support space and survival priorities by blocking opponent paths when possible without compromising your own reachability; never sacrifice open area for aggressive plays.
